conditions.today: 6 AM—Wakey, wakey, sleepyhead! Midweek wonders await, so get your head straight and pop outta that bed. Mostly sunny skies and mild, springlike temperatures will make for sensational crystal shredding on Rendezvous Mountain today. High temperatures will tick into the upper 20s at the summit, while Teton Village makes a run for the mid-40s. As your rosy cheeks absorb the soothing solar rays, they will be caressed and cooled by a gentle southwest breeze. You know everyone gets to decide for themselves on life's ultimate purpose. So, shun the toxic culture tales and run away with the magical alpine circus. -Lege
conditions.yesterday: 6 AM—Greetings on a gorgeous Tuesday morning. The globe is spinning us towards a day of sun-filled surprises in a snow-coated fantasyland. The unobstructed solar rays will be like kindling for your souls' smoldering fires as you dash and dance between gnarled trees and towering spires. Prepare for things to heat up close to 30 degrees on the deck of Corbet's Cabin and well into the 40s down in Teton Village. Nearly non-existent winds will keep the mountains calm and quiet through the day, highlighting the mellow atmospheric vibe. So, welcome to your personal promised land. Nirvana is close at hand. All you need to do is let go and allow your subtle sliding instincts to fully take command. -Lege

recommendations: Fresh corduroy on Tram Line - perfect for intermediate skiers
Fresh corduroy on Kemmerer (Upper) - challenging for advanced skiers
Fresh corduroy on Ranger - challenging for advanced skiers

morningBrief.headline: Midweek Bliss
morningBrief.body: Steady snowfall with 7" over the last week.
